task_text: Comprehensive test plan for catering agent — case curation + targeted gap-filling tests on top of existing infrastructure (16 test files, ~4400 LOC, plus PRs #72/#73/#74 dispatcher-replay + parity harnesses already shipped). Surfaces gaps from 2026-05-03 / 2026-05-05 real-traffic testing: multi-role/dual-identity (employee-as-customer), privilege escalation (employee approving owner-only operations), multilingual / code-switched (Telugu/Hindi/Tamil), vision-auth regression smoke, expiry/stale-code edges.
scope_decision: case curation + 4 targeted net-new test types (privilege escalation, multilingual, vision-auth regression smoke, expiry/stale-code); plan documents ~120 cases total across 11 flows (A-K) with ~70 already covered by existing tests; remaining gaps prioritized P0/P1/P2/P3 with build sequence as 4 commits totaling ~550-700 LOC
